samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="PIPELINE_STAGES" value="3">Number of pipeline stages in the adder.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i_en_reg" description="Register to store the input enable signal for addition operation">i_en</reg>
            <reg id="adda_reg" description="Register to store the input operand A">adda</reg>
            <reg id="addb_reg" description="Register to store the input operand B">addb</reg>
            <reg id="o_en_reg" description="Register to store the output enable signal">o_en</reg>
            <reg id="sum_reg" description="Register to store the sum of adda and addb" width_description="[64:0]">sum</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
        <always description="Update the input enable signal register on the rising edge of the clock or the falling edge of the reset signal">
            <if description="Reset the register when the reset signal is active low">
                <elseif description="Update the register when the reset signal is not active">
            </if>
        </always>
        <always description="Update the input operand A register on the rising edge of the clock or the falling edge of the reset signal">
            <if description="Reset the register when the reset signal is active low">
                <elseif description="Update the register when the reset signal is not active">
            </if>
        </always>
        <always description="Update the input operand B register on the rising edge of the clock or the falling edge of the reset signal">
            <if description="Reset the register when the reset signal is active low">
                <elseif description="Update the register when the reset signal is not active">
            </if>
        </always>
        <always description="Calculate the sum of adda and addb on the rising edge of the clock or the falling edge of the reset signal">
            <if description="Reset the sum register when the reset signal is active low">
                <elseif description="Update the sum register when the reset signal is not active">
                    <for description="Add the corresponding bits of adda and addb">
                    </for>
                </elseif>
            </if>
        </always>
        <always description="Update the output enable signal register on the rising edge of the clock or the falling edge of the reset signal">
            <if description="Reset the register when the reset signal is active low">
                <elseif description="Update the register when the reset signal is not active">
            </if>
        </always>
        <assign description="Assign the sum register to the output result">
        </assign>
        <assign description="Assign the output enable signal register to the output o_en">
        </assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
